caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap, a black t-shirt, a gold chain, and headphones sits in a studio setting, positioned behind a professional microphone. He is facing toward the left of the frame with a slight smile. The background is a white wall featuring logos and text, including several instances of "HUSTLE" accompanied by five stars. On-screen graphics are present at the bottom of the scene; on the left, a logo reads "STUDIO PODCAST," and on the right, text reads "BOSS TALK 101". The man's shirt features a white graphic that includes the words "CHECK IT". Across the sequence, the man remains in a mostly static position, with subtle shifts in his facial expression and head posture as he appears to be engaged in a conversation. The lighting and camera angle remain constant throughout the scene.
